scripts.test: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:contract && pnpm test:integration
scripts.test:unit: pnpm test:scaffold && node --test tests/config/*.test.mjs tests/ci/*.test.mjs tests/docs/*.test.mjs tests/scope/*.test.mjs tests/types/*.test.mjs tests/security/*.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @pasarai/contracts test:unit && pnpm --filter @pasarai/finance test && pnpm --filter @pasarai/analytics test && pnpm --filter @pasarai/api test && pnpm --filter @pasarai/elevenlabs-agent test && pnpm test:databricks && pnpm test:web
scripts.ci:check: pnpm contracts:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm typecheck:web && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:contract && pnpm config:check && pnpm security:check && pnpm seed:synthetic:reset && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:web:browser && pnpm scope:check
